title: FareMedium
description: The physical or digital medium used to carry or present a fare product, such as a contactless card, mobile app, or paper ticket.

mediumType.description: Type of fare medium (e.g. CONTACTLESS_CARD, MOBILE_APP, PAPER_TICKET, QR_CODE)

mediumId.description: Unique identifier or number of the physical or digital medium

resource.description: The resource being accessed against this entitlement
